chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 75 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.351/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 18.04.2025 None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. The continuous absence on the part of the petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggest that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
